message:
Running command: 
# Look at link_IPs.json to understand what's pre-installed vs custom
cat /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/link_IPs.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -m json.tool | head -50
echo "==="
# Check what the previous synthesis run produced - what modules ended up as standard cells vs macros
find /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs -name "*.nl.v" 2>/dev/null | head -5
